name: io.github.citedy/citedy-seo-agent
title: Citedy SEO Agent
description: Full-stack AI marketing toolkit — scout X/Twitter and Reddit for trends, analyze competitors & content gaps, publish SEO/GEO-optimized articles with AI images & voice-overs in 55 languages, create social media adaptations for 9 platforms, generate lead magnets, ingest any URL into structured content, and run fully automated content autopilot.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token with your Citedy API key (prefixed citedy_agent_). Get yours at https://www.citedy.com/dashboard/settings
